headline: USB Q1 Deep Dive: Consumer Deposit Growth and New Partnerships Drive Performance
summary: Financial services giant U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.2% year on year to $7.32 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.18 per share was 3.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
